invite_member_modal.error_mapping: getErrorMessage(errorCode) switch → copy.groups.* with generic default (lines 43-56)
invite_member_modal.success_flow: on result.ok: setSuccess, clear input, setTimeout 1500ms → clear success + onClose (lines 58-84)
invite_member_modal.qr: NpubQrModal rendered as fragment sibling, own useDisclosure (scanDisclosure), mode='scan', onScan writes npubInput
invite_member_modal.note: AddContactModal mirrors this, dropping groupId; adds onSuccess callback for contactsRevision bump

similar_features.trigger_pattern: pages/groups.tsx: useDisclosure() named {feature}Disclosure, Button onClick=onOpen with data-testid, modal as JSX sibling (repeated 4x convention)
similar_features.contacts_page: app/pages/contacts.tsx ContactListView (line 38): contactsRevision state (45) bumped after rememberContactsFromGroups (52-56), consumed as memo dep. Add button+modal here, bump on success. Copy keys to reword: description (85), emptyTitle/emptyBody (99-102).

purity_confirmed.knownPeers.ts: zero imports, header states no IDB/NDK/React/context/components; synchronous localStorage
purity_confirmed.walledGarden.ts: imports only `type Group`; single export isAllowedDmSender
purity_confirmed.contacts.ts: imports types, STORAGE_KEYS, isStorageAvailable (lib), isAllowedDmSender/WhitelistArgs (walledGarden.ts). lib→lib only.

architecture.layering: context/ → lib/ only; nothing in lib/ imports from context/. contacts.ts already imports walledGarden.ts (sibling lib), so adding knownPeers.ts import is same pattern — NO circular import risk.
architecture.no_prior_impl: no addContactByNpub symbol exists anywhere; no contacts.ts partial impl
architecture.paradigm_precedent: specs/epic-walled-garden-v2/architecture.md:3-6 'Modular monolith. Package-by-feature for module layout. Hexagonal seams at external boundaries' + strict hierarchy pages/ → components/ → context/ → lib/

testing.unit_runner: Vitest, config app/vitest.config.ts (picks up tests/unit/**/*.test.ts only). Run via `make test-unit` (cd app && npx vitest run).
testing.example_lib_test: app/tests/unit/contacts-groups.test.ts — Vitest, local makeGroup() factory + module-const pubkeys, no mocking libs (pure fns). app/tests/unit/contacts.test.ts uses hand-rolled localStorage mock via Object.defineProperty(globalThis,'localStorage',...).
testing.storage_mock_note: addContactByNpub touches localStorage — follow contacts.test.ts / contacts-ssr-guard.test.ts localStorage-mock convention.
testing.i18n_test: No structural key-parity gate. Convention: per-feature tests/unit/<feature>.i18n.test.ts asserting exact en+de string VALUES via getCopy('en'|'de'). New keys need their own such file.
testing.component_tests: NONE exist — zero *.test.tsx in repo. No RTL setup, no useMarmot() mock precedent. AddContactModal (S2) gets NO unit test, matching spec scope (only addContactByNpub tested).
testing.e2e: Only app/tests/e2e/groups-contacts.spec.ts touches Contacts page (relay-dependent, two-peer group discovery). Feature is local-only (npub→localStorage, no relay). New e2e not a technical necessity; CLAUDE.md gate is full 48-test suite (make test-e2e-all) regardless. Adding a spec would change the '48-test' baseline in CLAUDE.md — needs sign-off, so DEFAULT: no new e2e spec, rely on unit tests + full suite regression.
testing.make_targets: make test (unit+e2e-all), make test-unit, make test-e2e-all, make test-coverage (Makefile:89-141)
